en.name: Uta
en.effectText: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 {FILM} type card from your hand: Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.

jp.name: ウタ
jp.effectText: 【ブロッカー】(相手のアタックの後、このカードをレストにし、アタックの対象をこのカードにできる)【起動メイン】【ターン1回】自分の手札から特徴《FILM》を持つカード1枚を捨てることができる：自分のリーダーかキャラ1枚にレストのドン‼1枚までを、付与する。

definition.name: Uta
definition.text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 {FILM} type card from your hand: Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.

en.name: Gordon
en.effectText: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On Your Opponent's Attack] You may trash any number of {Music} type cards from your hand. Your Leader or 1 of your Characters gains +1000 power during this battle for every card trashed.

jp.name: ゴードン
jp.effectText: 【ブロッカー】(相手のアタックの後、このカードをレストにし、アタックの対象をこのカードにできる)【相手のアタック時】自分の手札から特徴《音楽》を持つカードを任意の枚数捨ててもよい。捨てたカード1枚につき、自分のリーダーかキャラ1枚は、このバトル中、パワー+1000。

definition.name: Gordon
definition.text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On Your Opponent's Attack] You may trash any number of {Music} type cards from your hand. Your Leader or 1 of your Characters gains +1000 power during this battle for every card trashed.

en.name: Charlotte Katakuri
en.effectText: If your Leader has the {FILM} type and you have 6 or more rested cards, this Character gains +2000 power.

jp.name: シャーロット・カタクリ
jp.effectText: 自分のリーダーが特徴《FILM》を持ち、自分のレストのカードが6枚以上ある場合、このキャラのパワー+2000。

definition.name: Charlotte Katakuri
definition.text: If your Leader has the {FILM} type and you have 6 or more rested cards, this Character gains +2000 power.

en.name: Shanks
en.effectText: [On Play] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters.

jp.name: シャンクス
jp.effectText: 【登場時】相手のレストのキャラ1枚までを、KOする。

definition.name: Shanks
definition.text: [On Play] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters.

en.name: Monkey.D.Luffy
en.effectText: If you have a rested [Uta], this Character gains +1000 power.

jp.effectText: 自分の「ウタ」がレストの場合、このキャラのパワー+1000。
